title: Rule-CorrType
description: Validates Rule-CorrType (Correspondence Type) payloads for Pega Infinity. Correspondence types define the delivery channel for outbound correspondence -- email, fax, postal mail, phone/text, etc.

pyRuleName.description: Internal rule name, used as the correspondence type identifier. Typically a short name like Email, Fax, Mail.

pyLabel.description: Human-readable display label for the correspondence type.

pyDescription.description: Developer-facing description of this correspondence type.

pyCorrType.description: The correspondence type name. Typically matches pyRuleName. Identifies the delivery channel (e.g. Email, Fax, Mail, PhoneText).

pyAddressClass.description: The Data-Address subclass used for this correspondence type (e.g. Data-Address-Email, Data-Address-Fax, Data-Address-Postal, Data-Address-PhoneText).

pyCorrClass.description: The Data-Corr subclass used for this correspondence type (e.g. Data-Corr-Email, Data-Corr-Fax, Data-Corr-Letter, Data-Corr-PhoneText).

pyCorrClassModel.description: The data transform (model) name applied to the correspondence class. Example: pyDefault.

pyUsage.description: Usage description for the correspondence type.

pyHistoryObject.description: Whether correspondence instances of this type are stored as history objects.
